pixelPaws.name: PixelPaws
pixelPaws.creator: Nova Studio
pixelPaws.description: A collection of pixel-style animal NFTs.
pixelPaws.themeTagline: Retro animal collectibles with a playful pixel-market vibe.
pixelPaws.normalizationNote: Display metadata is normalized to the experimental specification. Visual references were aligned to public OpenSea pixel-pet collections and then re-rendered as original mock artwork for the study UI.

sourceReferences.title: PIXEL PAWS NFT - Collection | OpenSea
sourceReferences.note: Primary public reference for pixel-pet composition, pixel-animal naming cues, and collection page visual rhythm.

sourceReferences.title: PixelPaw R02792 - pixelpawsnft | OpenSea
sourceReferences.note: Secondary item-level reference for close-up pixel-cat traits and detail-page presentation.

pixelPawsX.name: PixelPaws X
pixelPawsX.creator: Neo Studio
pixelPawsX.description: A collection of pixel-style animal NFTs inspired by the recent pixel animal trend.
pixelPawsX.themeTagline: A brighter sequel aesthetic shaped around the later pixel-animal trend cycle.
pixelPawsX.normalizationNote: The experimental label PixelPaws X is retained even though the final card art is a normalized mock asset. Styling references come from public OpenSea pixel collections launched around 2022, then re-authored for consistency with the study design.

sourceReferences.title: Pixelady Maker - Collection | OpenSea
sourceReferences.note: Used as a 2022 pixel-style reference for later-wave pixel collection presentation and UI mood.

sourceReferences.title: Mars Cats Voyage - Collection | OpenSea
sourceReferences.note: Used as a supporting public reference for stylized cat-themed PFP grids and thumbnail density.

cyberWhales.name: CyberWhales
cyberWhales.creator: Lunar Mint
cyberWhales.description: A collection of futuristic whale-themed NFTs with a science-fiction visual style.
cyberWhales.themeTagline: Sci-fi whale avatars with metallic gradients and deep-ocean neon lighting.
cyberWhales.normalizationNote: CyberWhales is presented with experiment-specific metadata. Artwork direction was normalized from public whale-themed OpenSea references and re-rendered as original mock assets so all collections share one coherent marketplace language.

sourceReferences.title: Secret Society of Whales - Collection | OpenSea
sourceReferences.note: Primary public whale-collection reference for marine silhouette motifs and collection page composition.
